merchandise.las_aranas_white.png: Logo for the Jonathan Edwards College Latine student group founded in 2026, Las Arañas.
merchandise.tulip_allison.png: Design for the 3<sup>rd</sup> Tulip Princess of the Jonathan Edwards College, a title bestowed to a student who embodies the "spirit of the tulip."
merchandise.bread_and_circuses_white.png: Logo for the Yale University society founded in 2025, Bread & Circuses.
merchandise.je_sux_center_white.png: Design for the Jonathan Edwards College store displaying the college's motto and mascot.
merchandise.je_sux_skew_white.png: Design for the Jonathan Edwards College store displaying the college's motto and mascot.
merchandise.tulip_maddy.png: Design for the 5<sup>th</sup> Tulip Princess of the Jonathan Edwards College, a title bestowed to a student who embodies the "spirit of the tulip."
